summary: Comprehensive testing of Printout customization data flow completed. All critical features verified: CartItem/OrderItem models store customization fields, checkout preserves data, Admin Orders displays nametag and photoalbum customization, Print function includes all customization data.

issues: HTML hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - minor React warning in console, does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Used existing test orders: test@printout.se (nametag), album@printout.se (photoalbum)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All customization data flow features are working. Backend models CartItem and OrderItem correctly store name, price, image, and customization Dict fields. Admin Orders page displays all customization data including nametag (child_name, font, font_color, motif, background) and photoalbum (total_pages, total_images, size, pages with image_urls). Print function includes all customization data. Upload base64 endpoint works correctly.

backend.upload_base64_valid: ✓ Base64 image upload returns valid URL
backend.cart_photoalbum_customization: ✓ Photo album with pages preserved in cart
backend.nametag_order_verification: ✓ Nametag order has child_name=Emma, font=pacifico, font_color=#E53935, motif=star, background=baby_blue
backend.photoalbum_order_verification: ✓ Photo album order has total_pages=20, total_images=3, size=A4 Liggande, pages with image_urls
backend.order_item_fields: ✓ OrderItem model has all required fields

frontend.admin_login: ✓ Admin login page loads and works
frontend.admin_orders_list: ✓ Orders list shows both test orders with totals
frontend.admin_nametag_details: ✓ Nametag order shows: Namn: Emma, Typsnitt: pacifico, Typsnittsfärg: #E53935, Motiv: star, Bakgrund: baby_blue
frontend.admin_photoalbum_details: ✓ Photo album order shows: Sidor: 20, Bilder: 3, Storlek: A4 Liggande, Bilder per sida with layouts
frontend.admin_print_function: ✓ Print output includes all customization data
frontend.nametag_customization: ✓ All customization options work (name, font, color, motif, background)
frontend.nametag_add_to_cart: ✓ Add to cart sends customization data correctly
frontend.cart_redirect: ✓ Redirects to cart after adding item

verified_features.backend_cartitem_model: ✓ Stores name, price, image, customization fields
verified_features.checkout_preserves_data: ✓ Customization data flows from cart to order
verified_features.admin_nametag_customization: ✓ Shows child_name, font, font_color, motif, background
verified_features.admin_photoalbum_customization: ✓ Shows pages, image_urls, total_pages, total_images, size
